title: Compress PDF Online - Reduce File Size
h1: Compress PDF Documents without Losing Quality
description: Shrink large PDF files up to 90% using adaptive lossless techniques directly in WebAssembly. Perfect for users in Oslo.

sections.title: Why Compress PDF Offline?
sections.content: Large PDFs are a pain to email. Our compressor reduces file size drastically without blurring images, all from your browser.

steps.title: Upload Large File
steps.description: Select the hefty PDF you want to shrink.

steps.title: Select Quality
steps.description: Choose between high quality or maximum compression.

steps.title: Download Tiny PDF
steps.description: Get your compressed file instantly, ready to share.

sections.title: Optimized PDF Shrinking in Oslo, NO-03
sections.content: Working on a slow connection in Oslo? Compress your files locally so you can email them faster.

sections.title: Secure Local Compression
sections.content: Compressing sensitive financial reports? Our algorithm works completely offline, keeping your data safe.

sections.title: Lightning Fast Shrink
sections.content: Compressing a 50MB file locally saves you the time of uploading 50MB and downloading 5MB back.

faqs.q: Will compressing my PDF make it blurry?
faqs.a: No, our tool uses adaptive compression to maintain readability while reducing size.

faqs.q: Are my files sent to a server to be compressed?
faqs.a: No, the compression algorithm runs directly in your browser memory.

faqs.q: What is the maximum file size I can compress?
faqs.a: Your browser memory is the only limit! You can compress massive files easily.
Absolutely free with no usage limits or premium paywalls.

faqs.q: Can I compress multiple files at once?
faqs.a: Batch compression is supported on modern browsers.
